case_title: IBARRA, RUBEN H. vs. BARILLAS, DANIELO et al

docket_entries.description: DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT BARILLAS, GLORIA BARILLAS, DANIL (SUED AS DANIELO)

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF IBARRA, RUBEN H. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR FEB-26-1998 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 606 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAR-04-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 606

DEPT 606, JDG RYAN, G.ESPINOCILLA,CLK, D.COSTELLO,CSR. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT ARE STATED ON THE RECORD. JUDGMENT PURS TO STIP IS SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES AND JDG RYAN IN OPEN COURT.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARILLAS, DANIELO BARILLAS, GLORIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1166 FLORIDA STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL MAR-31-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF WAIVES FEB & MAR RENT;PLTF DLVR $500 TO DEFTS ON/BEFORE 3/5/98;NO FURTHER STAYS;PERS PROP LEFT AFTER 3/31 SHALL BE DEEMED ABANDONED; DEFTS REP THAT THERE ARE NO OTHER TENANTS ENTITLED TO POSS OF PREMISES; PLTF ATNY STIP TO VAC JDGMT IF PREP BY DEFTS & IF DEFTS & ALL OCCUPANTS VAC BY 3/31/98
